experience.description: Led the development of a scalable microservices architecture for a new cloud platform. Mentored junior developers and improved code quality by 30%.
Developed and maintained responsive user interfaces for various client websites using React and Vue.js. Collaborated with designers to create visually appealing and user-friendly web applications.
